name: jp.rbulinx.sitl-engine
description: Generic, vehicle-agnostic ArduPilot SIM_JSON SITL bridge for Unity. Handles UDP/JSON transport, coordinate frame conversion, PWM decoding, telemetry filtering, and EKF diagnostics. Vehicle-specific physics (ROV water dynamics, UAV rotor dynamics, etc.) are supplied by a pluggable IVehicleForceModule implementation.
